name: wireframes-toolkit
description: Research, create, revise, and audit reference-backed black-and-white Figma wireframes with adaptive components.

interface.longDescription: Research, build, revise, and audit editable monochrome product wireframes with composition evidence from Mobbin, first-draft iconography, Auto Layout, adaptive reusable components, cross-screen change propagation, responsive reflow, and false-positive-aware visual QA. A bundled setup skill safely audits required and optional companions.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product brief into a complete Figma wireframe flow.
Audit these Figma wireframes for UX and Auto Layout issues.
Extend this wireframe flow with missing states and edge cases.
